name: loopspine
description: A benchmarked development loop for coding agents: plan, test, debug, review, and stop with proof.

interface.shortDescription: Keep coding agents moving until proof or a real stop.
interface.longDescription: LoopSpine routes non-trivial software work through bounded planning, TDD, debugging, QA, review, and shipping loops while preserving explicit publish and production boundaries.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use LoopSpine to handle this software task end to end, continuing through bounded feedback loops until the proof gate passes or a named stop condition fires.
